description_long: This ATM is a freestanding, rectangular kiosk with a slightly angled upper section housing a display and interface. The front features a gold-colored panel with a square screen, a card slot, and a possible receipt slot, all set within a green metallic body. The sides are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the robust, tamper-resistant construction typical of public financial machines. The rear is plain except for two circular vent-like features and a set of small perforations near the base, likely for ventilation or access. The base is broad and stable, designed to prevent tipping and provide a secure installation on sidewalks or in lobbies. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and clear user interaction points.
description: A robust, green and gold ATM kiosk with a square screen, card slot, and a sturdy, tamper-resistant body. The design is utilitarian, with clear user interface elements and a stable base.
description_view_0: The left side view shows a smooth, uninterrupted green surface with the angled upper section visible.
description_view_1: The front view displays the gold interface panel with a square screen, card slot, and possible receipt slot, all set in a green frame.
description_view_2: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the angled upper section and a plain green surface.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals two circular vent-like features and small perforations near the base, with no user interface elements.
attribute_screen_interface: A square, centrally placed screen on the gold panel, likely non-touch, with no visible UI elements or buttons on the display itself.
attribute_card_slot: One horizontal card slot located below the screen on the gold panel, with a dark opening and no visible illumination or labeling.
attribute_receipt_dispenser: A narrow slot to the right of the card slot, likely serving as a receipt dispenser, with no visible labeling or door.
